ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the producers table */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract describing the dataset's content and purpose */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Information on how to cite the dataset */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the dataset */,
  "access_url" TEXT /* URL where the dataset can be accessed */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is released */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, SPSS, R) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the dataset is updated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the producer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the producer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the producer is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, data analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., academic, government, non-profit) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the datasets table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
